title: Le Haut-Richelieu Regional County Municipality

(French pronunciation: [[lə o ʁiʃ(ə)ljø]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French"), lit. 'The Upper Richelieu') is a [regional county municipality](/wiki/Regional_county_municipality "Regional county municipality") in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") region in southwestern [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), Canada. Its seat is in [Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu](/wiki/Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu "Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu"). It is named for the [Richelieu River](/wiki/Richelieu_River "Richelieu River") which runs south-north through it.

+ [A-35](/wiki/Quebec_Autoroute_35 "Quebec Autoroute 35") | * **Principal Highways**   + [R-104](/wiki/Quebec_Route_104 "Quebec Route 104")   + [R-133](/wiki/Quebec_Route_133 "Quebec Route 133") | * **Secondary Highways**   + [R-202](/wiki/Quebec_Route_202 "Quebec Route 202")   + [R-219](/wiki/Quebec_Route_219 "Quebec Route 219")   + [R-221](/wiki/Quebec_Route_221 "Quebec Route 221")   + [R-223](/wiki/Quebec_Route_223 "Quebec Route 223")   + [R-225](/wiki/Quebec_Route_225 "Quebec Route 225")   + [R-227](/wiki/Quebec_Route_227 "Quebec Route 227") | * **External Routes**   + [US 11](/wiki/U.S._Route_11_in_New_York "U.S. Route 11 in New York")   + [NY 276](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_276 "New York State Route 276")   + [VT 225](/wiki/Vermont_Route_225 "Vermont Route 225") |

["*Banque de noms de lieux du Québec*: Reference number 141078"](https://toponymie.gouv.qc.ca/ct/ToposWeb/fiche.aspx?no_seq=141078). *toponymie.gouv.qc.ca* (in French). [Commission de toponymie du Québec](/wiki/Commission_de_toponymie_du_Qu%C3%A9bec "Commission de toponymie du Québec").

["2021 Community Profiles"](https://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2021/dp-pd/prof/details/page.cfm?Lang=E&DGUIDlist=2021A00032456). *[2021 Canadian census](/wiki/2021_Canadian_census "2021 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. February 4, 2022. Retrieved 2023-10-19.

["2016 Community Profiles"](http://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2016/dp-pd/prof/index.cfm?Lang=E). *[2016 Canadian census](/wiki/2016_Canadian_census "2016 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. August 12, 2021. Retrieved 2019-11-25.

["2011 Community Profiles"](http://www12.statcan.gc.ca/census-recensement/2011/dp-pd/prof/index.cfm?Lang=E). *[2011 Canadian census](/wiki/2011_Canadian_census "2011 Canadian census")*. Statistics Canada. March 21, 2019. Retrieved 2014-02-08.

**Le Haut-Richelieu Regional County Municipality** (French pronunciation: [[lə o ʁiʃ(ə)ljø]](/wiki/Help:IPA/French "Help:IPA/French"), lit. 'The Upper Richelieu') is a [regional county municipality](/wiki/Regional_county_municipality "Regional county municipality") in the [Montérégie](/wiki/Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie "Montérégie") region in southwestern [Quebec](/wiki/Quebec "Quebec"), Canada. Its seat is in [Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu](/wiki/Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu "Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu"). It is named for the [Richelieu River](/wiki/Richelieu_River "Richelieu River") which runs south-north through it.

## Subdivisions

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Le_Haut-Richelieu_Regional_County_Municipality&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Subdivisions")]

There are 14 subdivisions within the RCM:[[2]](#cite_note-mamrot-2)

|  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Cities & Towns (1)   * [Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu](/wiki/Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu "Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu") | Municipalities (12)   * [Clarenceville](/wiki/Clarenceville,_Quebec "Clarenceville, Quebec") * [Henryville](/wiki/Henryville,_Quebec "Henryville, Quebec") * [Lacolle](/wiki/Lacolle,_Quebec "Lacolle, Quebec") * [Mont-Saint-Grégoire](/wiki/Mont-Saint-Gr%C3%A9goire,_Quebec "Mont-Saint-Grégoire, Quebec") * [Noyan](/wiki/Noyan,_Quebec "Noyan, Quebec") * [Saint-Alexandre](/wiki/Saint-Alexandre,_Quebec "Saint-Alexandre, Quebec") * [Saint-Blaise-sur-Richelieu](/wiki/Saint-Blaise-sur-Richelieu,_Quebec "Saint-Blaise-sur-Richelieu, Quebec") * [Saint-Paul-de-l'Île-aux-Noix](/wiki/Saint-Paul-de-l%27%C3%8Ele-aux-Noix,_Quebec "Saint-Paul-de-l'Île-aux-Noix, Quebec") * [Saint-Sébastien](/wiki/Saint-S%C3%A9bastien,_Mont%C3%A9r%C3%A9gie,_Quebec "Saint-Sébastien, Montérégie, Quebec") * [Saint-Valentin](/wiki/Saint-Valentin,_Quebec "Saint-Valentin, Quebec") * [Sainte-Brigide-d'Iberville](/wiki/Sainte-Brigide-d%27Iberville,_Quebec "Sainte-Brigide-d'Iberville, Quebec") * [Venise-en-Québec](/wiki/Venise-en-Qu%C3%A9bec,_Quebec "Venise-en-Québec, Quebec") | Parishes (1)   * [Sainte-Anne-de-Sabrevois](/wiki/Sainte-Anne-de-Sabrevois,_Quebec "Sainte-Anne-de-Sabrevois, Quebec") |
